headline: How Investors May Respond To AT&T (T) Linking Fraud-Resistant Identity To Converged Small-Business Bundles
summary: In early July 2026, Aduna announced a nationwide Number Verification solution built with AT&T, T‑Mobile, and Verizon to provide real-time, possession-based mobile identity checks and reduce AI-driven fraud, while AT&T also expanded its Build-A-Plan bundles and was ranked highest for small business internet satisfaction by J.D. Power. Taken together, these developments highlight AT&T’s push to tie secure identity, flexible converged connectivity, and small business service quality into a more...

headline: Top wireless stock remains Wall Street favorite amid space risk
